title: Exclude TX airtime from queue latency
description: TxQueue.confirm_transmitted samples latency after Radio.transmit completes, so max_latency_ms and avg_latency_ms include on-air transmit duration rather than only queue wait, contrary to appendix-bufferbloat metric semantics. Capture dequeue/handoff time separately while retaining confirmation-only transmitted counts. Discovered reviewing convergence commit d422a03b; outside frozen reconciliation.
